blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,465 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
